title: Checkout
subtitle: Fill in shipping details, pick how you'd like to pay, then place your order.

address.heading: Shipping address
address.notesHint: E.g. ring twice, use the side entrance, etc.

useNew.title: Use a new address
useNew.subtitle: Fill in the shipping details below

address.saveAsNew: Save this address to my address book

payment.heading: Payment method
payment.errorLoad: Couldn't load payment methods. Please try again.
payment.noMethods: No payment methods are available right now. Please contact support.

empty.title: No payment methods available
empty.help: An administrator has temporarily disabled every payment method. We can't complete checkout right now.

buyerNote.label: Note for the order (optional)
buyerNote.hint: Anything else we should know? Up to 1000 characters.

empty.title: Your cart is empty
empty.subtitle: Add at least one item before checking out.

addressNotSavedTitle: Address not saved to your address book
addressNotSavedBody: Your order went through, but your address book is full. Remove one and add this address from Account → Addresses later.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong while placing your order. Please try again.
errors.recipientNameTooShort: Recipient name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.recipientNameTooLong: Recipient name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.governorateTooLong: Governorate must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.cityTooLong: City must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.streetAddressTooLong: Street + building must be 200 characters or fewer.
errors.floorTooLong: Floor must be 50 characters or fewer.
errors.apartmentTooLong: Apartment must be 50 characters or fewer.
errors.landmarkTooLong: Landmark must be 200 characters or fewer.
errors.notesTooLong: Notes must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.paymentMethodRequired: Pick a payment method to continue.
errors.buyerNoteTooLong: Note must be 1000 characters or fewer.
errors.labelRequired: Please enter a label for the new address.
